description: CompositionBlue kurta with tribal print, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, and has a square neck with blue tape on the neckline and buttoned chest placketFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this blue printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in its tribal print, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
